label: Strategy Harness Status
description: Build an operational status snapshot for a running or recently completed strategy harness round.

inputs.name: round-dir
inputs.description: Path to the strategy harness round directory.

outputs.name: harness/live-status.json
outputs.description: Operational live status snapshot emitted under the round harness directory.

failureModes.description: The supplied round directory does not exist or is not readable.
The status snapshot is older than the decision being made and must be refreshed.
The supervisor appears to have exited before the round completed.

evidencePolicy: This is operational evidence for monitoring and next-action routing.
It is not promotion evidence by itself.
A stale status or heartbeat cannot authorize a fresh live launch.
Promotion decisions require completed-market packets, visual review, execution lifecycle, and reconciliation.
notes: Use this before manual log inspection for active or recently completed S1 rounds.
